arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola denies rumours of a rift with Kevin De Bruyne
arts.sum: De Bruyne was given only 12 minutes at Anfield as Manchester City’s winless run continued.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola hits back at Gary Neville and Jamie Carragher over Kevin De Bruyne claim
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has hit back at Sky Sports pundits Gary Neville and Jamie Carragher for suggesting he had an issue with Kevin De Bruyne

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola sends brutal reality check to Man City players over title defence
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has led Manchester City to a remarkable 18 trophies in eight years at City, but they are winless in their last seven games in all competitions, including six defeats

arts.ttl: Liverpool face 'more difficult' test up next after Real Madrid and Man City wins
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot is wary of the threat posed by Newcastle despite the Magpies winning just two of their last nine Premier League games ahead of their clash on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Man City boss Pep Guardiola sets Gary Lineker straight over Kevin De Bruyne claims
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola was clear about where he stands with Kevin De Bruyne as the midfielder works his way back

arts.ttl: 'Top of the league' - Pep Guardiola defiant on Man City after Jose Mourinho comparison
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spoke about what he believes his squad is capable of as they look to end their winless run

arts.ttl: Report: Arne Slot could sign £1.5m star who won MOTM vs Man City to replace Mo Salah next season
arts.sum: Arne Slot is having a dream start to life at Liverpool. There was some pressure on the Dutchman when he was appointed as the new...

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Nottingham Forest: Predicted XI, team news and injury updates as Nuno makes three changes
arts.sum: The state of play and predicted team ahead of a tough test...

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher forces Sky Sports into deleting Man City content after Liverpool defeat
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher was left fuming after a Sky Sports post appeared to suggest that the Liverpool legend claimed Manchester City would miss out on the top four.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Premier League title favourites: Pep Guardiola, Manchester City knocked out of race, Arsenal, Mikel Arteta hanging on
arts.sum: Liverpool have eliminated Manchester City from the title race and are so far ahead of Arsenal that only an injury crisis could prevent the Reds from winning the league.
